description_long: This is a large, menacing axe with a dark, jagged blade featuring multiple pointed protrusions along its lower edge, giving it an aggressive, fantasy-inspired appearance. The blade is thick and robust, with a matte black finish and a slightly irregular, almost serrated profile. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood, wrapped with textured bands for improved grip, and capped with a dark pommel at the base. The transition between the blade and handle is reinforced with metallic fittings, possibly for added durability and aesthetic appeal. The overall construction suggests a weapon designed for both intimidation and heavy-duty use, likely more decorative or ceremonial than practical for everyday urban tasks. The axe's imposing design and dark coloration make it stand out as a dramatic object in any urban environment.
description: A large, dark, jagged-bladed axe with a long wooden handle and reinforced grip, featuring multiple pointed edges and a robust, fantasy-inspired design.
description_view_0: The axe is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blade and the full length of the handle.
description_view_1: The broad, jagged blade with multiple pointed protrusions is fully visible, highlighting the aggressive design and the reinforced transition to the handle.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the blade's thickness and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is visible, mirroring view 1, with the jagged edges and dark finish clearly shown.
attribute_handle_type: Long, straight cylindrical wooden handle with textured grip bands and a dark pommel; appears ergonomic and sturdy.
attribute_blade_design: Large, thick, matte black blade with multiple jagged, pointed protrusions along the lower edge; single main cutting edge with aggressive, fantasy-inspired geometry.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and reinforced with metallic fittings at the transition between blade and handle.
